mapper.update: UPDATE kids_own.tb_ca_e_file_group_trsm SET file_nm = COALESCE(#{fileNm} , file_nm) , file_enc_nm = COALESCE(#{fileEncNm} , file_enc_nm) , file_path = COALESCE(#{filePath} , file_path) , download_cnt = COALESCE(#{downloadCnt}, download_cnt) , file_content = COALESCE(#{fileContent}, file_content) , file_size = COALESCE(#{fileSize} , file_size) , file_type = COALESCE(#{fileType} , file_type) , img_width = COALESCE(#{imgWidth} , img_width) , img_height = COALESCE(#{imgHeight} , img_height) , del_yn = COALESCE(#{delYn} , del_yn) , up_datetime = NOW() WHERE 1=1 AND del_yn = 'N' AND file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.atch_file_id , a.atch_file_group_id , a.file_seq , a.prvc_incl_yn , a.use_yn FROM kids_own.tb_ca_e_file_trsm a WHERE 1 = 1
AND a.strg_file_nm = #{strgFileNm}
